options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -honor_dont_use
options.description: honor dont_use on base_cells during EEQ swapping in SDP legalization

options.name: -honor_orient
options.description: honor user specified orient during legalization

options.name: -legalization
options.description: Specify fixed corner of sdp box during legalizing sdp instance

options.name: -legalization_effort
options.description: Specifies the legalization effort in placing SDP groups

options.name: -max_move_distance
options.description: max sdp group move distance, default is half perimeter of the core box

options.name: -num_column
options.description: number of column for sdp group

options.name: -place_report
options.description: Output a detailed sdp placement data. Use empty string to reset to no output

options.name: -pre_fixed_cells_blockage_direction
options.description: {NONE|X|Y} Specify the direction when covering preplaced std cells using placement blockages
